notes: Mirror this file under picoLLM control when available.
Until the mirror exists, the runtime falls back to the historical public S3 URL.
This dataset is intentionally not mirrored into picoLLM-owned hosting by default because the shard set is large.
The manifest keeps the exact upstream source explicit without bundling the full dataset into release artifacts.
This is used by the spelling tasks.
The runtime prefers a picoLLM-owned mirror first and falls back to the upstream raw GitHub file.
